titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Uthman Al-Amri
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Uthman Al-Amri

segments: ه عن محمّد بن عثمان العمريّ- قدّس اللّه روحه- فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن محمّد بن عثمان العمريّ [قدّس اللّه روحه‌].
arabic.text: ه عن محمّد بن عثمان العمريّ- قدّس اللّه روحه- فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن محمّد بن عثمان العمريّ [قدّس اللّه روحه‌].

segments: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Uthman Al-Amri - may Allah (swt) sanctify his soul - I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari, from Muhammad ibn Uthman Al-Amri - may Allah (swt) sanctify his soul.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Uthman Al-Amri - may Allah (swt) sanctify his soul - I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari, from Muhammad ibn Uthman Al-Amri - may Allah (swt) sanctify his soul.
